tagline: Service design for a better world.

about.headline: About
about.intro: Hi! I'm Jay (she/they). I work as a service design lead in digital security.
about.body: I am available for UXR consulting roles individually, and for digital safety and security consulting and forensics with other consultant experts from my network.

contact.headline: Let's connect
contact.subtitle: For portfolio work or consulting inquiries, reach out by email or book a time.
